personas.name: Subscription Conscious Trial User
personas.description: A prospective or new subscriber who wants to evaluate Headspace safely and expects clear pricing, fair billing, and trustworthy cancellation behavior.
goals: Understand pricing and renewal terms before subscribing
Start or cancel a trial without surprise charges
Resolve billing issues quickly when something goes wrong
pain_points: Unexpected charges after trial cancellation or renewal
Refund requests are denied or difficult to complete
Paywalls prevent meaningful evaluation before purchase
context: Evaluating the app during onboarding or a free trial
Managing subscriptions through Google Play or direct billing
Using a mental wellness app and expecting low stress support
constraints: Pricing and renewal terms must be explicit before payment
Cancellation state must be visible and trustworthy
Billing help must be accessible without long back and forth support loops

personas.name: Reliability Focused Daily User
personas.description: A user who opens Headspace for regular daily use and expects the app to launch quickly, navigate smoothly, and remain stable during normal interactions.
goals: Open the app quickly when needed
Navigate core screens without freezing or crashing
Use daily features without technical friction
pain_points: Screens freeze or take too long to load
Basic features return errors instead of working reliably
context: Opening the app during short breaks or daily routines
Moving between home, daily check ins, and content screens
Using the app on a mobile device where quick access matters
constraints: The app must launch consistently on supported devices
Core navigation must not require repeated restarts or cache clearing
Recoverable failures should not force the user out of the flow

personas.name: Interrupted Meditation Practitioner
personas.description: A regular meditator who depends on uninterrupted playback and clear recovery behavior so sessions remain calm, immersive, and trustworthy.
goals: Trust the app during longer audio sessions
pain_points: Meditation audio pauses or stops mid session
False offline or playback errors break concentration
Users cannot tell whether silence is intentional or a failure
context: Practicing guided meditation, focus sessions, or longer audio content
Listening with the screen dimmed or while minimizing the app
Using the app specifically to reduce stress and maintain focus
constraints: Playback continuity must be reliable enough to preserve focus
Interruptions must be surfaced immediately and clearly
Users need a way to resume from the point of failure

personas.name: Sleepcast Dependent Bedtime User
personas.description: A sleep focused user who relies on Sleepcasts, soundscapes, and bedtime audio at night and needs the experience to remain stable, quiet, and easy to use in low attention moments.
goals: Fall asleep using sleep focused audio
Keep nighttime playback running without waking up again
pain_points: Sleepcasts crash or cut off after a few minutes
Abrupt stops or vibrations wake the user back up
Sleep content is hard to browse or filter at bedtime
context: Using the app at night with minimal screen interaction
Trying to fall asleep while anxious, exhausted, or caring for a newborn
Relying on screen off playback for longer overnight listening
constraints: Sleep content must keep playing with the screen off
The interface must be low friction and easy to browse in bed
Playback should avoid disruptive haptics or abrupt audio failure

personas.name: Mindfulness Seeking Recovery User
personas.description: A user who turns to Headspace for anxiety relief, stress reduction, grief support, and long term personal growth through guided mindfulness.
goals: Reduce stress, anxiety, or emotional overwhelm
Find supportive content that matches a current life need
pain_points: Needs guided support during difficult emotional periods
May struggle to maintain a routine without structure and encouragement
Needs content that feels approachable and relevant to the moment
context: Using the app for daily self care, recovery, or emotional support
Engaging with meditation courses, grief packs, or short calming sessions
Returning over months or years to build a consistent habit
constraints: Supportive content must be easy to discover by need
The experience must reinforce consistency over time
Guidance should feel calming and accessible to beginners and returning users
